Description: Replace misleading Jira Project Management Insights with accurate metrics and signal-gated advice. Fixes false positives like low resolution rate on healthy active backlogs.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic done when insights only appear on real signals labels match metric definitions and generic boilerplate removed

Summary: Fix Jira resolution rate metric definition
Description: Change jira_metrics.py: report issues_resolved_last_30d (resolutiondate >= -30d) separately from issues_created_last_30d. Do not label created/resolved ratio as resolution_rate without age context. Paginate beyond maxResults 100.
Acceptance Criteria: API returns resolved_in_period created_in_period open_backlog; unit tests with fixture; dashboard labels updated

Summary: Remove or gate hardcoded insight thresholds in dashboard
Description: Remove client-side rules resolutionRate < 70 and totalIssues > 50 from dashboard.html. Replace with signal-based or factual-only display until backend provides attention items.
Acceptance Criteria: No red Low resolution rate on active backlog like 58 created 20 resolved; generic retro bullets removed or behind empty state

Description: Rename cards: Created (30d) Resolved (30d) and add Open backlog or Throughput. Tooltip explains JQL. Avoid Resolution Rate unless computed on age-adjusted cohort.
Acceptance Criteria: User sees what each number measures; no ambiguous Resolution Rate on same-window created set

Summary: Wire Jira delivery signals to insights panel
Description: When ENABLE_SIGNAL_ENGINE on surface existing signals (no jira activity high reopen etc.) in Jira section instead of template text. Same reason string as Needs Attention.
Acceptance Criteria: Insights list matches signal engine output; flag off shows metrics only no fake advice

Description: Optional workspace settings for when to warn: min open backlog max median age min resolved per week. Used by signal or insight builder only when exceeded.
Acceptance Criteria: Defaults conservative; snooze/dismiss pattern aligns with repo attention backlog

Summary: Tests for Jira metrics and insight gating
Description: pytest for jira_metrics resolved vs created JQL; dashboard or API test that 58/20 does not emit low resolution insight.
Acceptance Criteria: Regression test for false positive scenario; full suite green
